sidebar.health_tip_desc: Regularly uploading and comparing reports helps tracking blood pressure and cholesterol changes over months.

dashboard.welcome_back: Welcome back, {{name}}. Monitor and discuss your laboratory indicators.
dashboard.no_report_desc: Upload your first laboratory test PDF report. Our RAG system will extract readings, outline abnormal values, and let you ask questions.

upload.title: Upload Medical Report
upload.subtitle: Upload your medical files securely. All text processing and vector operations are encrypted and confidential.
upload.hipaa_shield_desc: Data is parsed dynamically. Vectors are deleted when you delete the report record.
upload.byok_desc: Your keys are never stored on the server database. They run dynamically from browser local memory.
upload.no_training_desc: Your medical text is not used to train global AI models. Complete isolation of your medical profile.
